query: Review the prepared install-script diff that adds a slash command mapping to the harness.
fixture_description: Applied a patch to scripts/install.sh and scripts/install.ps1 that adds a new slash command mapping.
baseline_gaps: Agent may underweight install-script idempotence, shell portability, or config overwrite risks.
Agent may miss that the new slash command points to a missing recipe and can prevent slash command updates.
Agent may miss rollback and backup expectations.
expected_behavior: Flags the missing harness-security-review.yaml recipe as a blocker or high-severity issue.
Produces an explicit verdict (pass, pass-with-nits, or block) for the diff.
Proposes durable follow-up using Beads `bd create` commands or issue titles instead of markdown TODO files.
expected_skill_contribution: The code-review skill should catch an explicit install-script regression, rank it correctly, and discuss idempotence, backups, path safety, tests, and rollback without over-exploring.
fixture_intent: Normal fixture: a direct missing-recipe install mapping regression; expected to be caught by a practical review checklist.

query: Review the prepared skill-evaluation docs diff and tell me what follow-up work remains. Do not create files; propose durable Beads follow-ups when needed. If no parent bead is provided, provide unlinked draft `bd create` commands or issue titles instead of claiming they are linked.
fixture_description: Applied a patch to docs/15-skill-evaluations.md and evals/skills/README.md that updates guidance for tracking eval follow-up work.
baseline_gaps: Agent may leave follow-up work only in prose.
Agent may accept markdown TODOs instead of Beads durable tracking.
Agent may claim follow-ups are linked even when no parent bead is provided.
expected_behavior: Identifies the TODO.md guidance as conflicting with Beads durable tracking.
Produces an explicit verdict (pass, pass-with-nits, or block) for the diff.
Proposes Beads follow-ups or draft `bd create` commands without creating markdown TODO files; uses a discovered-from link only when a parent bead is provided.
Identifies real follow-up work separately from the review verdict.
expected_skill_contribution: The code-review skill should separate a durable tracking anti-pattern from review nits and propose Beads-compatible follow-ups without creating files or inventing a parent link.
fixture_intent: Difficult fixture: documentation introduces markdown TODO tracking; expected to distinguish durable Beads follow-ups from review nits without a parent bead.

query: Review the prepared diff for changes to harness recipes, skills, docs, and install scripts. Focus on correctness, validation, Beads follow-ups, and whether the change violates harness workflow rules.
fixture_description: Applied a patch that modifies harness-review.yaml, code-review/SKILL.md, and docs/15-skill-evaluations.md.
baseline_gaps: Agent may provide a generic summary without a verdict or severity-ranked findings.
Agent may miss that TODO.md conflicts with Beads durable tracking.
Agent may miss that reducing recipe max_turns can break handoff completeness.
expected_behavior: Inspects the prepared diff and states a pass/pass-with-nits/block verdict.
Ranks findings by severity with exact file references when possible.
Checks the diff against harness rules such as Beads durable tracking and validation handoff.
Lists missing validation and proposes exact Beads `bd create` commands or issue titles instead of markdown TODOs.
expected_skill_contribution: The code-review skill should review a mixed multi-surface diff, produce a verdict, severity-ranked findings with file references, identify harness-rule violations, and propose exact validation/follow-up work.
fixture_intent: Very difficult fixture: mixed recipe/skill/docs regression; expected to connect multiple harness rules and validation gaps in one review.
